Cremissimo Ice Cream Vanilla with Creme Anglaise 1 LTR

Cremissimo ice cream turns everyday moments into something worth savouring. Smooth, creamy, and unapologetically indulgent. Madagascan Vanilla Ice Cream with Dreamy Swirls of Vanilla Crème Anglaise. Don't worry, we don't know how to pronounce that last bit either. And we're the ones making it. According to the internet it's pronounced krem ong-glaze. There you go. You're now practically fluent in French. So, reward yourself with some magnifique ice cream. Bon appétit.



Crafted Ice Cream

Madagascan Vanilla Ice Cream

Dreamy Vanilla Crème Anglaise Sauce

No Artificial Colour, Flavours or Sweeteners

AdditionalAttributes.description:
BLUE RIBBON SEASONAL LOW-FAT ICE CREAM VANILLA 2 LTR 1 TUB (CASE = 6 TUBS)

Treat the family to Blue Ribbon Classic Vanilla Frozen Dessert. Proudly made in Australia with creamy, wholesome buttermilk and no artificial colours, it’s Australia’s no.1 vanilla tub*. It's the perfect pairing to any dessertand great all by itself!

Blue Ribbon was created by Edwin 'Ted' Streets in 1968, in the small town of Corrimal, NSW. He began by selling his signature buttermilk vanilla ice cream to his neighbours with the help of his wife Daisy and his brothers. Today, Streets is one of Australia’s biggest and best-known ice cream makers.

From its humble beginnings, Blue Ribbon has become a family favourite and now includes a range of classic flavours such as Chocolate, Neapolitan and Cookies & Cream, to name a few. Discover why Blue Ribbon famously doesn’t last long in the freezer – it's so tasty! There's a flavour of Blue Ribbon for everyone in the family to create happy memories together.

Looking for a serving suggestion? Blue Ribbon goes well with saucy toppings or fruit. It’s also fun to eat in cones during summer for a nostalgic trip back to childhood memories; however, we like it the best just the way it is.

*Source: Nielsen data MAT to 20/06/2023. Australia grocery excl. Aldi, Ice Cream (incl. Ice Cream & Ice Confection), Vanilla Flavour, all formats, Dollars & Units.

Treat your loved ones to Blue Ribbon Classic Vanilla Frozen Dessert

Blue Ribbon desserts have been enjoyed by generations of Australians since 1968

A delicious dessert the whole family can share, made with quality ingredients

The nation's number 1 vanilla tub*, made locally in Australia

Find out why Blue Ribbon desserts famously run out in Australian freezers

This frozen dessert is made with creamy, wholesome buttermilk and no artificial colours

CONNOISSEUR Classic Vanilla 1L

Ice cream can take you to some unexpected places. Our quest for the world's finest vanilla bean led us to the shores of Madagascar. Infused with this exotic flavour, our Classic Vanilla ice cream will carry you away.

Starting with locally sourced Tassie spuds, our premium crinkle cuts are coated in our secret recipe batter and gently cooked in 100% canola oil, creating a golden, crispy texture that's as satisfying as it is delicious. Perfectly crispy on the outside yet tender on the inside, these chips are the go-to side dish for a range of culinary creations that leave a lasting impression.
Elevate your dining experience with a fun snack platter by serving them with a tangy dip or a spicy aioli, a loaded dish by topping with melted cheese, sour cream, and fresh chives for an indulgent treat or pair them with your favourite burger or steak for the perfect, crave-worthy side.

- Perfectly versatile for snacking, side dishes, or creative loaded toppings

An Eye for Good, Birds Eye
